message:
🐛 Fix main content overlap when AI Missions sidebar is open (#3015)

The missions sidebar is 680px wide but the main content only reserved
580px of right margin, causing 100px of overlap. Updated both the main
content margin and the offline banner right offset to match the actual
sidebar width (680px).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
